title: RAS
description: Resistor Agnostic Structure (RAS). When wrapped with inputs + outputs, forms a valid PEAS document.

inputs.description: Design requirements and operating points for this resistor
inputs.title: inputs

outputs.description: Computed results per operating point. outputs[i] aligns positionally with inputs.operatingPoints[i]. Mirrors the MAS pattern (array of per-operating-point bundles).
outputs.title: outputs
